windows.old_description: Automatic candle machine: rows of white candles formed in the moulds (steam).
windows.embed_text_v2: industrial candle moulding machine ejecting rows of white candles from a blue multi-cavity metal mould, wax-crusted plate, demoulding pillar candles, workshop, worker with bucket
windows.summary_v2: An industrial blue multi-cavity candle-moulding machine ejects rows of freshly formed white candles as a worker tends it in a workshop.

seconds_v2.desc: Industrial candle workshop: a blue metal multi-cavity candle-moulding machine seen at an angle, rows of white wicks/candles rising out of the wax-crusted mould bed; red overlay text 'Inquiry:- 09891174712' along the bottom.
Camera pans across the blue moulding machine; the metal mould plate is caked with white wax, partially formed candles seated in the dense grid of cavities, phone-number overlay still shown.
Freshly demoulded white candles are lifted on the machine's raising plate, dozens of slim white cylinders pulled up together out of the multi-cavity mould, wax debris around the frame.
High-angle view down the long blue mould bed packed with hundreds of small candle cavities, white candle tops flush in the grid, machine wet with spilled wax.
The lifting frame raises a tilted tray of newly molded white candles clear of the mould, rows of pointed white candle tips visible, overlay number on screen.
Closer on the extracted rack of white candles standing in rows as the ejector plate holds them up above the blue mould, wax-coated machine parts around.
The mould plate is tilted further, long columns of demoulded white candles angled out of the machine, industrial workshop background dim.
Wider angle of the blue candle machine with the raised bank of finished white candles; a worker's torso (no face) appears at left holding a metal bucket.
Worker at far left carries a bucket past the machine (face out of frame); the large blue moulding rig of demoulded white candles fills the right side, phone-number overlay persists.
